evals.prompt: Review the code changes on my current branch against develop
evals.expected_output: A structured code review report with severity-classified findings covering the diff between the current branch and develop. Should include summary, severity breakdown table, individual findings with file/line references, and actionable suggestions.

evals.prompt: I just finished a feature branch, can you check it against main for any issues before I open a PR?
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive code review that examines all changes between the feature branch and main, identifies potential bugs, security issues, performance concerns, and provides a structured report with severity levels. Should also include positive observations.

A code review report comparing the current branch against origin/master with the standard template: summary, severity breakdown, findings with code snippets and suggestions, positive observations, and questions for the author.
